hero.eyebrow: // program manager · producer · maker of things
hero.heading: Olivia Krowicka
hero.sub: Great products don't ship by accident. I build the structure and set up the building blocks that make successful product delivery possible, keeping people focused on the work that matters.

about.heading: Building with intention — across disciplines.
paragraphs: I'm a Program Manager who works at the intersection of structured systems and creative work. By day, I build the workflows, tooling, and documentation that help teams ship. By night I design games and write.

My PM work is rooted in lean, native tooling and getting the most out of platforms teams already use without introducing tool sprawl. I like to prototype in a demo space before proposing org-level changes, because nobody likes a surprise restructure.
When I write, it's about process, art, inspiration, and craft to share knowledge about the work we do and how we do it.

stats.label: Years of experience across digital, e-commerce, mobile and games
JIRA tickets created, triaged and tagged for easy queries

principles.title: Demo before proposing
principles.body: Nobody likes a surprise restructure. Prototype the change in a safe space first. Show, don't pitch.

principles.title: Lean tooling
principles.body: The best tool is the one a team already has. Add a new platform only when the native option genuinely can't do the job.

principles.title: Documentation as first-class work
principles.body: A system nobody can onboard into is a system that will break. Good docs aren't overhead — they're the product.

principles.title: Design pillars as filters
principles.body: A design pillar isn't a vibe. It's a decision-making tool. If it can't be used to say no to something, it's not doing its job.

principles.title: Estimation without overhead
principles.body: Story points, velocity, T-shirt sizes — pick one and make it dead simple. Complexity in the estimation system defeats its own purpose.

principles.title: Iterative refinement
principles.body: The first version is a hypothesis. Ship it, learn from it, improve it. Quality is a direction, not a destination.

contact.heading: Let's work together.
contact.sub:
Whether it's a service, software, a game you're building, or something you want to bring to life, or just want someone to collaborate with on a problem.

Reach out and let's chat.
